chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.NO.S-1263 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on MA-6474/2017 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on MA-2659/2017 4. For katcha peshi. 09.10.2017 Mr. Rahat Basheer Siddiqui, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Sher Muhammad Leghari, State Counsel. = With reference to the notice of this case, learned A.A.G files statements/comments on behalf of respondents No.5, 6, 7, 8, 10, 11 and 12, which are taken on record and copies supplied to the learned Counsel for the petitioner. In the statement filed on behalf of respondent No.10, it is mentioned that on the complaint of Adnan S/o Assadullah by caste Indhar, resident of Haliji Sharif, Taluka Pano Akil, an FIR was lodged bearing No.192 of 2014 under Section 395 PPC at P.S Airport against accused Faqeer Muhammad and others in which the petitioner’s name was also mentioned as an accused and after usual investigation, the case was challaned before the concerned Court, however, petitioner Aadil Raza was absconder in the said case. It is also mentioned in the statement that necessary directions have been issued to DSP/SDPO Site Area, Sukkur and SHO P.S Airport not to cause any harassment to the petitioner and to act in accordance with law in the matter and provide protection to the petitioner and his family members. In view of such situation, this petition is being disposed of with direction to the official respondents to perform their duties and responsibilities strictly in accordance with law and shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner or his other family members.

It is also mentioned in the statement that necessary directions have been issued to DSP/SDPO Site Area, Sukkur and SHO P.S Airport not to cause any harassment to the petitioner and to act in accordance with law in the matter and provide protection to the petitioner and his family members. In view of such situation, this petition is being disposed of with direction to the official respondents to perform their duties and responsibilities strictly in accordance with law and shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner or his other family members. The petitioner, however, is directed to appear before the concerned Court and face the trial in respect of FIR No.192 of 2014 in accordance with law, failing whereof, shall face consequences. JUDGE Shahid
